headline: Will Kraft Heinz's NFL Deal Strengthen Its Growth Recovery Plan?
summary: KHC's five-year NFL partnership aims to boost brand relevance, spark game-day demand and expand foodservice reach as it works to revive growth.

headline: Ketchup Or Catch-Down? Kraft Heinz Is Racing Against Structural Decline
summary: Kraft Heinz (KHC) outlook: structural headwinds, FY26 reset with EPS/sales declines, tariff risks vs a 7% yield and cheap P/E.

headline: Unilever, Kraft Heinz Explored Food Merger as Industry Faces Weak Demand, FT Reports
summary: The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) is included among the 14 Under-the-Radar High Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. On March 18, Reuters reported that Unilever and The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) had recently held talks about a possible merger of parts of their food businesses, according to the Financial Times. headline: Kraft Heinz Bets On PowerMac And NFL Tie Up As Valuation Lags
summary: Kraft Heinz (NasdaqGS:KHC) introduced PowerMac, a high-protein, high-fiber version of Kraft Mac & Cheese. The company announced a five-year global partnership with the NFL, covering multiple international markets. Kraft Heinz, known for brands like Kraft Mac & Cheese and Heinz ketchup, is pushing further into the higher protein and better-for-you meal category with PowerMac. For investors watching packaged food companies, this move speaks directly to demand for convenient options that also...
